heading: Why This Template
strength1Description: React 19 RSC with Next.js 16 App Router. Minimal client surface, maximum performance.
strength2Description: Full strict mode with Zod 4 runtime validation. Zero any, typed errors everywhere.
strength3Description: AGENTS.md conventions, skills system, and auto-loaded instructions baked in.
strength4Description: Thai and English support via next-intl. Structured namespaces, no spaghetti translations.
strength5Description: Seamless theme switching via next-themes and Chakra UI v3. Works in both SSR and client.
strength6Description: Vitest, ESLint, Pino logging, and strict type coverage. Ready to deploy from day one.
subheading: Built on proven conventions so your team ships faster from day one.
